elements.name: BrowserRuntime.launch_session
elements.evidence: Isolation context required, sandbox_token generated, state machine transition to READY

elements.name: BrowserRuntime.navigate_to
elements.evidence: Guard I1+I3 enforced pre-action, sandbox_token validated, session tracked

elements.name: BrowserRuntime.execute_script
elements.evidence: Guard I3 blocks script_exec missing capability, requires sandbox_token

elements.name: BrowserRuntime.capture_dom_state
elements.evidence: DOM DAG structure with deterministic dom_hash

elements.name: DesktopWorker.click
elements.evidence: Guard I1+I2+I3 enforced: selector, spatial bbox, capability, sandbox token

elements.name: DesktopWorker.type_text
elements.evidence: Guard I3 enforced (keyboard_input capability), optional target handled

elements.name: DesktopWorker.screenshot_region
elements.evidence: Deterministic image_hash (RULE 1), region isolation

elements.name: DesktopWorker.get_foreground_window
elements.evidence: Returns sandboxed window info

elements.name: VisionGrounding.detect_ui_element
elements.evidence: Guard I5 enforced, confidence threshold 0.7, deterministic bbox

elements.name: VisionGrounding.extract_text_ocr
elements.evidence: Deterministic text_hash, confidence scoring

elements.name: VisionGrounding.compute_spatial_bbox
elements.evidence: Deterministic absolute bbox, visibility check, covered_pct

elements.name: VisionGrounding.match_template
elements.evidence: Threshold enforcement (RULE 3), deterministic match_hash

elements.name: SessionJournal.record_action
elements.evidence: Deterministic state_hash chain, previous_entry_hash integrity

elements.name: SessionJournal.save_checkpoint
elements.evidence: Checkpoint hash, action_count snapshot, guard I7 enforced

elements.name: SessionJournal.replay_to_state
elements.evidence: Deviation detection, state_hash verification, I8 enforced

elements.name: SessionJournal.rollback_transaction
elements.evidence: Checkpoint verification, journal truncation, state restoration

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_selector_valid (I1)
elements.evidence: Empty selector → BLOCKED_SELECTOR

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_spatial_bbox_verified (I2)
elements.evidence: Out-of-viewport coords → BLOCKED_SPATIAL, invalid bbox → BLOCKED_SPATIAL

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_capability_match (I3)
elements.evidence: Missing capability → BLOCKED_CAPABILITY, token mismatch → BLOCKED_CAPABILITY

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_session_isolation (I4)
elements.evidence: Wrong session state → BLOCKED_SANDBOX

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_vision_consistency (I5)
elements.evidence: Stale visual hash → blocked, low confidence → blocked

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_journal_integrity (I6)
elements.evidence: Chain hash mismatch → blocked

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_resource_quota (I7)
elements.evidence: Action/cpu/session limits enforced

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.guard_replay_determinism (I8)
elements.evidence: State hash mismatch during replay → blocked

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.check_pre_action
elements.evidence: Composite guard: I1+I2+I3+I5 before every action

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.transition (12 transitions)
elements.evidence: G1–G12 all enforced, terminal state blocks, invalid transition rejected

elements.name: ComputerUseSessionStateMachine.compute_state_hash
elements.evidence: SHA-256 chain: prev_hash:seq:action:selector:input:visual:guard:error

elements.name: ComputerUseTraceCorrelator.generate_session_trace_id
elements.evidence: h1_<28 hex chars>, derived from mission_trace_id + index + timestamp

elements.name: ComputerUseTraceCorrelator.propagate_to_* (3 methods)
elements.evidence: propagate_to_g5, propagate_to_phase4, propagate_to_f4 all record correlation

elements.name: ComputerUseTraceCorrelator.trace_chain
elements.evidence: Full back-traceability: session_id → layers → mission_trace_id

elements.name: CompositionRoot.computer_use_runtime wiring
elements.evidence: All 6 H1 components wired, isolation_runtime injected, strict_session_mode

elements.name: TestInteractionGuardEnforcement (5 tests)
elements.evidence: No action without selector + bbox + capability + sandbox

elements.name: TestSandboxIsolationCompliance (4 tests)
elements.evidence: Sandbox token required, invalid token rejected

elements.name: TestTraceCorrelation (4 tests)
elements.evidence: session_trace_id propagates across all layers

elements.name: TestJournalRollbackSafety (4 tests)
elements.evidence: Deterministic hashing, checkpoint rollback, replay verification

elements.name: TestBrowserDesktopVisionHappyPath (3 tests)
elements.evidence: Full lifecycle: launch → navigate → click → type → screenshot → detect → bbox

elements.name: TestGuardI1SelectorValidity (2 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I1 blocks empty selector, passes valid selector

elements.name: TestGuardI2SpatialBBox (2 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I2 blocks invalid bbox, passes valid coords

elements.name: TestGuardI3CapabilityMatch (4 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I3 blocks missing capability, token mismatch, empty action

elements.name: TestGuardI4SessionIsolation (2 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I4 blocks disallowed session state

elements.name: TestGuardI5VisionConsistency (3 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I5: matching hash passes, stale hash blocked, low confidence blocked

elements.name: TestGuardI6JournalIntegrity (2 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I6: matching hashes pass, mismatch blocked

elements.name: TestGuardI7ResourceQuota (4 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I7: action/cpu/session limits all enforced

elements.name: TestGuardI8ReplayDeterminism (2 tests)
elements.evidence: Guard I8: matching hashes pass, mismatch blocked

elements.name: TestPreActionCompositeGuard (3 tests)
elements.evidence: All checks pass → PASSED; missing selector → BLOCKED_SELECTOR; missing cap → BLOCKED_CAPABILITY

elements.name: TestStateMachineTransitions (10 tests)
elements.evidence: All 6 states reachable, terminal blocks, invalid transition rejected, history tracks

elements.name: TestDeterministicHash (2 tests)
elements.evidence: Same inputs → same hash; different action → different hash

elements.name: TestSessionTraceIdPropagation (22 tests)
elements.evidence: Generate, propagate to all layers, trace chain, resolve session, reset
